core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine industrial precision with digital fluidity.
Emotion First: The dashboard must feel like a high-performance engine.
Content is King: Data clarity is paramount; visualization is the hero.
Negative Space: Use dark voids to emphasize glowing data points.
anti_patterns: No pure black (#000000) backgrounds; use deep charcoal/obsidian.

layout.grid_system: The Bento Grid (Mode B: High Density)

structure.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-full border-r border-border bg-surface z-50
structure.header: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border h-16 flex items-center px-6

buttons.base_class: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

inputs.base_class: flex h-10 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 font-mono

cards.base_class: rounded-lg border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden
cards.effect: Use a subtle 'scanline' or 'grid' background pattern overlay if possible.

timeline.description: A horizontal scrollable timeline. Use CSS Grid for precise time slot placement.
timeline.visuals: Dark track with bright neon bars for slots. Current time indicator is a vertical cyan line with a glowing tip.

effects: Pulse animation for 'New Gap Found' notification.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 against dark backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible high-contrast ring for keyboard navigation.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings.
Do not use gradients on text.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.

setup: Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors and fonts.
implementation_order: 2. Build the Timeline Component (The Core Feature).
